---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to screen '...'
2. Tap '...'
3. Paste '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages or screenshots.

## Environment
- **Android version:** (e.g. Android 14)
- **Device:** (e.g. Pixel 7, Samsung Galaxy S23, or Emulator)
- **App version:** (check the Releases page — e.g. v1.0.0)
- **How installed:** (APK from GitHub / F-Droid / built from source)

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots. Note: please do not include screenshots
containing plaintext decrypted messages.

## Additional Context
Anything else relevant — e.g. does it happen with all keys or just one,
does it happen with PGP key mode or passphrase mode, etc.
